text.tspan: request master manifest from cDS::Session Management
request steering manifest from cDS: Content Steering
request variant manifest from cDS::Node A
Player fail over to cDS::Node B
cDS::Telemetry detect cDS::Node A is down
Player fail over to cDS::Node B
packet loss, retransmission timer timeout, send duplicate ACK to request retransmission
steering manifest expire, request an updated steering manifest
cDS::Node A and cDS::Node B are removed from the list
